name: Zucchini-Carrot Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add zucchini, carrots, and onion to the skillet and sauté for 8 to 10 minutes or until tender.
3. Remove from heat; stir in sour cream and shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Transfer mixture to a lightly greased 1 quart baking dish.
5. Sprinkle breadcrumbs evenly over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Yield: 4 servings
Prep time: 15 minutes
Bake time: 20 minutes
